/usr/bin/cc CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/generated/Lab1GrammarLexer.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/generated/Lab1GrammarParser.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/reader.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/parser.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/ast.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/cfg.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/err_list.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/ot.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/type.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/tables.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/codegen.c.o -o main   -L/mnt/c/Users/nmogi/Desktop/spo3/spo3/libantlr3c-3.4/build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/mnt/c/Users/nmogi/Desktop/spo3/spo3/libantlr3c-3.4/build/lib -lantlr3c
